# MTR Urban Construction — A Modpack Designed for City and Metro Building

MTR Urban Construction is a modpack created for players who enjoy modern city-building, urban planning, and metro system construction in Minecraft. It provides a complete and stable environment that supports long-term projects, large-scale city layouts, and fully functional transit networks. The modpack focuses on metro systems, infrastructure, road networks, architecture, and urban decoration while maintaining strong performance and compatibility

Whether you are working in a single-player world or building a large collaborative server, this modpack offers an out-of-the-box setup that allows you to start constructing immediately

## Main Features
### Metro and Railway System
- Includes a high-quality metro mod with trains, stations, platform screen doors, signaling, and line configuration
- Supports custom metro routes, underground tunnels, elevated tracks, and realistic train operations
- Suitable for creating full city-scale rail transit networks

### Enhanced City-Building Capabilities
- Adds a wide variety of modern building materials, glass panels, metal structures, and architectural blocks
- Provides detailed interior and exterior decoration options to enrich the city’s appearance
- Enables the construction of office districts, residential areas, commercial zones, transport hubs, and other urban structures

### Urban Infrastructure and Traffic Systems
- Includes road blocks, traffic signs, lighting, and street-level details
- Allows players to design intersections, overpasses, pedestrian areas, plazas, parking lots, and more
- Supports realistic urban transportation layouts

### Suitable for Servers and Collaborative Projects
- Optimized for performance while maintaining a rich selection of city-building mods
- Designed for long-term multiplayer projects and large construction teams
- Works well for themed servers, public servers, or private cooperative builds

### Compatibility and Version Support
- Supports Minecraft 1.19.2 and 1.20.1
- Compatible with both Forge and Fabric
- Includes both client-side and server-side options, making deployment flexible

## Recommended for Players Who
- Enjoy urban planning and large-scale construction
- Want to build realistic modern cities with functioning metro systems
- Run servers focused on long-term city projects
- Prefer collaborative building with friends or community members
- Seek a stable environment tailored for infrastructure-heavy worlds

# A Ready-to-Build Experience
All included mods are curated and configured to provide a smooth, coherent building experience without additional setup. Once you load into the world, you can immediately begin designing roads, placing tracks, constructing stations, and developing your city step by step

[Welcome to join our discord](https://discord.gg/kVtBeyw5fm)
